code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut product = 1
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    1
  end
  product = product * n
  i = i + 1
end

println("product=#{product}")
